title: Highguard Pattern Lock
objective: Repair escalating highguard patterns over a short run, balancing speed against accuracy as fake pulses and blackout beats try to force a mistake.

controls.outcome: Stabilize the sequence and build multiplier
Avoid trap pulses that would break the streak

steps: A fresh highguard pattern flashes across the board, then fades into static.
You replay the real sequence while the game injects decoy beats and faster blackout windows.
Long clean chains raise the multiplier, but one wrong pad triggers a shutdown shock that resets the combo clock.
scoring: Perfect pattern recalls score the most, especially when chained across blackout rounds. Late-round sequences are worth more because the fake pulses arrive faster.
tips: Chunk the pattern into two-beat phrases instead of memorizing the whole line at once.
Decoy flashes often echo officially; wait a breath for the true highguard beat.
If the board speeds up, protect the streak before chasing a risky perfect clear.
